zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Standish於大約1316年出生在英國藍卡爾斯坦迪什時，他的父親John Standish31歲，母親Margaret de Everingham25歲。他於大約1347年與Lady Isolde Lea在英國藍卡爾斯坦迪什結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1396年在英國英格蘭藍卡爾斯坦迪什享年81歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭藍卡爾斯坦迪什。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry Standish于大约1316年出生在英国藍卡爾斯坦迪什时，他的父亲John Standish31岁，母亲Margaret de Everingham25岁。他于大约1347年与Lady Isolde Lea在英国藍卡爾斯坦迪什结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1396年在英国英格兰藍卡爾斯坦迪什享年81岁，埋葬在英国英格兰藍卡爾斯坦迪什。

nameMeanings.name: Standish
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): habitational name from Standish (Lancashire, now part of Greater Manchester), from Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + edisc ‘enclosure, enclosed park’. Standish (Gloucestershire) does not appear to have contributed towards the surname.

History: Myles Standish (c. 1584–1656) was a soldier of fortune, from 1620 captain of the Mayflower Pilgrims at Plymouth Colony. Little is known of his origins and early life, but in his will he claimed to be descended from a leading Catholic family, the Standishes of Standish, Lancashire, England. He also claimed to have been deprived of his inheritance, a claim not confirmed.

variants.name: Standage
meanings: in Leicestershire and Buckinghamshire, the name may alternatively be from Stanedge Grange in Hartington Nether Quarter or Stanage End in Outseats (both Derbyshire); but evidence is needed for this. The placenames derive from Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + ecg ‘edge, escarpment’.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Standish was born about 1316, in Standish, Lancashire, England, his father, John Standish, was 31 and his mother, Margaret de Everingham, was 25. He married Lady Isolde Lea about 1347, in Standish, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died in 1396, in Standish, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 81, and was buried in Standish, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry Standish est né environ 1316, à Standish, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, John Standish, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Margaret d’Everingham, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Lady Isolde Lea environ 1347, à Standish, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1396, à Standish, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 81 ans, et a été enterré à Standish, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry Standish um 1316 in Standish, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Standish 31 und seine Mutter Margaret de Everingham 25. Er hat um 1347 in Standish, Lancashire, England Lady Isolde Lea geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1396 im Alter von 81 Jahren in Standish, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Standish, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Standish è nato il circa 1316 nel Standish, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, John Standish, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Margaret de Everingham, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Lady Isolde Lea circa 1347, nel Standish, Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1396, nel Standish, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 81 anni, e fu sepolto a Standish, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry Standishが約1316年にイギリスランカシュアイアスタンディッシュで生まれた時，父John Standishは31歳，母Margaret de Everinghamは25歳であった。約1347年にイギリスランカシュアイアスタンディッシュでLady Isolde Leaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1396年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアスタンディッシュで81歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスランカシュアイアスタンディッシュにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Standish(이)가 대략 1316년 영국 랭카실르 스탠디시에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Standish(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret de Everingham(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1347년 영국 랭카실르 스탠디시에서 Lady Isolde Lea(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1396년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 스탠디시에서 81세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 스탠디시에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Standish nasceu aproximadamente 1316, em Standish, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Standish, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Everingham, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Isolde Lea aproximadamente 1347, em Standish, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1396, em Standish, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 81 anos, e foi sepultado em Standish, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry Standish родился около 1316 г. в местности стандиш, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Standish было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Everingham, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Isolde Lea около 1347 г. в местности стандиш, ланкашир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1396 г. в местности стандиш, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 81 год и был похоронен в местности стандиш, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry Standish nació aproximadamente 1316, en Standish, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Standish, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Margaret de Everingham, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Lady Isolde Lea aproximadamente 1347, en Standish, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió en 1396, en Standish, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 81 años, y fue sepultado en Standish, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
